title: B09TFVLHVZ– Décor Track Tritan Hydration Goals Water bottle, Sports design with easy flip spout, integrated carry handle and Motivational ML graduations, BPA free, 600 ml, Teal and Pink
features: Time-marked water bottle - Décor track Tritan water bottle is perfect for keeping you hydrated at school, work, or the gym. It features a hygienic flip-open, the snap-n-seal straw that allows you to drink on the go no matter where you are!

Motivational water bottle – This Décor 600ml Teal Water bottle has been printed with handy volume markings in increments of 150ml, 300ml & 450ml to ensure you stay motivated to hit you reach your hydration goals.

BPA-Free water bottle - Décor's clear plastic sports water bottles are made of sturdy, strong Tritan material, 100% BPA-FREE plastic, ensuring this eco-friendly, leak-proof drinks canteen is free from toxins & odours.

Water bottle with straw - Features a Flip open straw & handle. This clear plastic water bottle is lightweight and features an integrated carry handle making it ideal for the gym or when travelling outdoors.

Décor have been making re-useable products such as water bottles; food storage containers, microwave safe tupperware, lunch boxes and snack tubs for Australians for over 60 years; our products are beautiful, functional, affordable, and made to last.
